candidate_message: Preserve grounded findings from mute policy
required_invariants: grounded findings remain canonical regardless of source role or remediation disposition
unfiltered default finding queries include ReviewOnly findings
normalized filters and unfiltered scopeTotal are explicit
FindingDisposition has no Muted or Suppressed variant
disposition changes remain directionless semantic owner-payload changes
performance samples cannot pass by changing authored semantic truth
independence_boundary: The included verifier checks immutable binding and anchors only; the external reviewer derives the design verdict independently.
